hero.title: Reliable partner in the international logistics market
hero.subtitle: Leading company in international shipping and logistics since 2016.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: We offer a wide range of logistics services for the safe and rapid delivery of your cargo.

road.title: Road Freight
road.description: Transportation of all types of cargo by road across Europe, CIS, and China.

air.title: Air Freight
air.description: Air delivery from anywhere in the world in the shortest possible time.

sea.title: Sea Freight
sea.description: Cost-effective transportation of large volumes of cargo via oceans and seas.

warehouse.title: Warehousing
warehouse.description: Storage and packaging of goods in our modern warehouses in China and Uzbekistan.

insurance.title: Cargo Insurance
insurance.description: Reliable insurance of your cargo against all types of risks.

express.title: Express Delivery
express.description: Fast door-to-door delivery of small and urgent shipments.

about.title: About Us
about.description: BSM Consulting has had its place in the international logistics market since 2016. We help our clients deliver cargo safely and quickly from China and all over the world.

locations.title: Our Locations
locations.description: Our logistics network and partners across the globe.

feedback.title: Contact Us
feedback.description: Contact our specialists and get a free consultation.
